preprocessingNotes: Three NNDb participants watching the same movie. Each participant's BOLD was z-scored per voxel, then averaged across the three at every voxel — idiosyncratic fluctuations cancel; shared cognitive response survives. K=4000 k-means parcellation (≈ 4 million cortical neurons per patch). Per-parcel percentile normalization (5th–95th → [0, 1]); gamma 0.85; real-time playback at TR = 1 s.
